creator: dima@Chg.RU
text:
>
> Doesn't package: PREFIX problem.  Specifically: the package installs stuff
> under ${PREFIX}/BerkeleyDB/{bin,include,*} but the PLIST doesn't match
> this.  I have run out of time to track and fix this today, sorry!
>

It does package! All files are installed under ${PREFIX}/{bin,include,...}!


> Also, could you move pkg/MESSAGE to files/MESSAGE as it isn't otherwise
> used by the pkg_* system?

As far as I know, pkg_* system uses pkg/MESSAGE instead of files/MESSAGE.
On my home computer this compiles and packages without any problem!

--Dima
